controls.position: Do not implement HPKP in production edge policy.
controls.rationale: HPKP is deprecated and operationally unsafe for modern browser security posture.
controls.evidence_requirement: Document policy and keep HSTS/TLS controls enforced.

controls.position: Do not require Expect-CT header as a mandatory control.
controls.rationale: Expect-CT is deprecated and superseded by current CT ecosystem behavior.
controls.evidence_requirement: Document policy and validate certificate transparency through CA and monitoring process.
